page.title: Sotogrande Yacht Charter Group Size Limits: Maximum Guests by Boat Type

data.meta_description: Sotogrande yacht charter group size limits explained. Maximum guests per boat from 5 to 12 pax. Find your perfect fit for a day on the Costa del Sol.
data.summary: Learn the maximum guest capacity for each boat in our Sotogrande fleet, from 5 to 12 passengers. Choose the right yacht for your group size and enjoy a day on the water from Puerto Banús.
key_facts: Maximum guest capacity ranges from 5 pax (Dubhe, Mariah SX21) to 12 pax (Mangusta 80, Azimut 58, Ferretti 94).
All charters depart from Puerto Banús, a short drive from Sotogrande.
Every booking includes a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% IVA.
Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) cost €749 for 2 hours, up to €2,299 for 8 hours.
Tier B boats (Mangusta 80) start at €4,719 for 4 hours and include a free jet ski.
Other boats have pricing available on request via WhatsApp.
Group size limits are strict for safety and insurance—no exceptions allowed.

faq.q: What is the maximum group size for a yacht charter from Puerto Banús to Sotogrande?
faq.a: Our fleet accommodates groups from 5 to 12 passengers. The smallest boats, like the Dubhe (8m) and Mariah SX21 (6.4m), take up to 5 guests. Larger yachts such as the Mangusta 80 (24m) or Ferretti 94 (29m) can host up to 12 guests. Always check the specific boat capacity before booking.

faq.q: Can I take more than 12 guests on a single yacht?
faq.a: No, 12 passengers is the absolute maximum across our fleet. This limit is set by maritime safety regulations and insurance. If you have a larger party, we recommend booking two yachts or contacting us via WhatsApp for personalised advice.

faq.q: Are children counted in the group size limit?
faq.a: Yes, children of any age are included in the maximum passenger count. For example, a family of 5 with 2 children can still charter the Dubhe (5 pax), but not a larger group on a boat with a lower capacity. Safety first.

faq.q: What boats are best for a small group of 5-6 people?
faq.a: For 5 guests, the Dubhe (8m) or Mariah SX21 (6.4m) are ideal. For 6 guests, the Red Tide (11m) or Speedboat (7m) work well. These boats are perfect for an intimate day trip to Sotogrande or nearby coves like Cala del Faro.

faq.q: What boats are best for a group of 10-12 people?
faq.a: For 10 guests, choose the Lagoon 380 (11.6m, 10 pax) or Pershing 46 (14m, 10 pax). For 12 guests, the Mangusta 80 (24m), Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m), Ferretti 94 (29m), or Canados 86 (26m) are excellent options. All depart from Puerto Banús.

faq.q: Is it possible to combine two boats for a larger group?
faq.a: Yes, you can charter two or more boats simultaneously. For instance, a group of 18 could book a Mangusta 80 (12 pax) and a Pershing 46 (10 pax). Contact us via WhatsApp to arrange a multi-boat charter from Puerto Banús.

faq.q: Do the group size limits include the crew?
faq.a: No, the crew (skipper and any additional staff) are not counted in the passenger limit. Our licensed skipper is included with every charter. So a boat with a 12-pax limit can carry 12 guests plus the skipper.

faq.q: What happens if my group exceeds the maximum capacity?
faq.a: We cannot allow any guests beyond the stated maximum. If you arrive with more people than the boat’s limit, the charter may be cancelled without refund. Always confirm your exact headcount when booking to avoid disappointment.

data.body_html:
Planning a Sotogrande yacht charter with friends or family? One of the first things you need to know is how many guests your chosen boat can hold. Group size limits vary by vessel, from intimate 5-person speedboats to spacious 12-person luxury yachts. All our boats depart from Puerto Banús, just a 30-minute drive from Sotogrande, making it easy to start your day on the water. Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% IVA — so you can focus on enjoying the Costa del Sol.

Why Group Size Limits Matter on a Sotogrande Yacht Charter

Group size limits aren't just arbitrary numbers. They're set for your safety, comfort, and legal compliance. Each boat has a maximum passenger capacity based on its size, stability, and safety equipment. Exceeding that limit can lead to fines, insurance voiding, or even a cancelled trip. On a Sotogrande yacht charter, you'll want everyone to have enough space to relax, sunbathe, and enjoy the views of La Concha mountain or the Gibraltar coastline. Overcrowding spoils the experience.

Our fleet ranges from 5 to 12 passengers. For example, the Dubhe (8m) takes 5 guests, while the Mangusta 80 (24m) takes 12. Always confirm the capacity when booking. If your group is larger than 12, consider chartering two yachts — we can arrange that via WhatsApp.

Small Group Boats (5–6 Guests) for Sotogrande

If you're a couple, a small family, or a tight-knit group of friends, these boats offer a cosy and cost-effective option. They're perfect for a quick trip to Cala del Faro or a sunset cruise past the Golden Mile.

  • Dubhe (8m, 5 pax) — ideal for an intimate day out.
  • Mariah SX21 (6.4m, 5 pax) — a nimble speedboat for exploring.
  • Red Tide (11m, 6 pax) — more deck space for a small crew.
  • Speedboat (7m, 6 pax) — fun and fast for a short charter.

Prices for these boats are available on request. Just contact us via WhatsApp for a custom quote.

Medium Group Boats (8–10 Guests) for Sotogrande

For a group of friends or a larger family gathering, these yachts strike a balance between space and affordability. They're great for a full-day charter to Estepona or anchoring at Cabopino.

  • Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) — Tier A pricing: €749/2h to €2,299/8h.
  • Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax) — same Tier A pricing, slightly more capacity.
  • Fairline Targa 12m (12m, 10 pax) — a classic flybridge cruiser.
  • Lagoon 380 (11.6m, 10 pax) — a catamaran with stable sailing.
  • Pershing 46 (14m, 10 pax) — sleek and fast for longer distances.
  • Bandido (11.5m, 8 pax) — a sporty option for 8 guests.

Large Group Boats (12 Guests) for Sotogrande

When you want to bring the whole crew — up to a dozen friends or family — these are the flagships of our fleet. They offer ample deck space, sun pads, and often a flybridge for panoramic views. Perfect for a trip to Sotogrande itself or a longer cruise to Gibraltar.

  • Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) — Tier B pricing: €4,719 min 4h, includes a free jet ski.
  • Mangusta 80 (Grey) (24m, 12 pax) — same spec, different colour.
  • Mangusta 80 (White) (24m, 12 pax) — same spec, different colour.
  • Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m, 12 pax) — a spacious flybridge yacht.
  • Canados 86 (26m, 12 pax) — a large, elegant motor yacht.
  • Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) — the largest in our fleet.
  • K80 (24m, 12 pax) — modern lines and great stability.
  • Maiora 26m (26m, 12 pax) — Italian style and comfort.

All large-group boats depart from Puerto Banús. For pricing on non-Tier B boats, message us on WhatsApp.

How to Choose the Right Boat for Your Group Size

Here's a quick decision guide for your Sotogrande yacht charter group size:

  • 5 guests or fewer → Dubhe, Mariah SX21, or Speedboat.
  • 6 guests → Red Tide or Speedboat.
  • 8 guests → Bandido.
  • 9–10 guests → Astondoa 40, Azimut 39, Fairline Targa, Lagoon 380, or Pershing 46.
  • 11 guests → Azimut 39 (11 pax).
  • 12 guests → Any of the 12-pax boats listed above.

Remember, the skipper is not counted in the passenger limit. So a 12-pax boat can carry 12 guests plus crew. Always book in advance, especially during summer when demand is high.

What's Included in Every Sotogrande Yacht Charter

No hidden costs. Every booking includes:

  • Licensed skipper (English and Spanish speaking).
  • Fuel for the entire trip.
  • Bottled water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, and cava.
  • Light snacks (chips, olives, nuts).
  • Insurance and safety equipment.
  • Spanish IVA (21%) already included in the price.

For Tier A boats, the all-in price is €749 for 2 hours, €1,049 for 3 hours, €1,299 for 4 hours, €1,799 for 6 hours, and €2,299 for 8 hours. Tier B boats (Mangusta 80) start at €4,719 for 4 hours and include a free jet ski. All other boats are priced on request.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the maximum group size for a yacht charter from Puerto Banús to Sotogrande?

Our fleet accommodates groups from 5 to 12 passengers. The smallest boats, like the Dubhe (8m) and Mariah SX21 (6.4m), take up to 5 guests. Larger yachts such as the Mangusta 80 (24m) or Ferretti 94 (29m) can host up to 12 guests. Always check the specific boat capacity before booking.

Can I take more than 12 guests on a single yacht?

No, 12 passengers is the absolute maximum across our fleet. This limit is set by maritime safety regulations and insurance. If you have a larger party, we recommend booking two yachts or contacting us via WhatsApp for personalised advice.

Are children counted in the group size limit?

Yes, children of any age are included in the maximum passenger count. For example, a family of 5 with 2 children can still charter the Dubhe (5 pax), but not a larger group on a boat with a lower capacity. Safety first.

What boats are best for a small group of 5-6 people?

For 5 guests, the Dubhe (8m) or Mariah SX21 (6.4m) are ideal. For 6 guests, the Red Tide (11m) or Speedboat (7m) work well. These boats are perfect for an intimate day trip to Sotogrande or nearby coves like Cala del Faro.

What boats are best for a group of 10-12 people?

For 10 guests, choose the Lagoon 380 (11.6m, 10 pax) or Pershing 46 (14m, 10 pax). For 12 guests, the Mangusta 80 (24m), Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m), Ferretti 94 (29m), or Canados 86 (26m) are excellent options. All depart from Puerto Banús.

Is it possible to combine two boats for a larger group?

Yes, you can charter two or more boats simultaneously. For instance, a group of 18 could book a Mangusta 80 (12 pax) and a Pershing 46 (10 pax). Contact us via WhatsApp to arrange a multi-boat charter from Puerto Banús.

Do the group size limits include the crew?

No, the crew (skipper and any additional staff) are not counted in the passenger limit. Our licensed skipper is included with every charter. So a boat with a 12-pax limit can carry 12 guests plus the skipper.

What happens if my group exceeds the maximum capacity?

We cannot allow any guests beyond the stated maximum. If you arrive with more people than the boat’s limit, the charter may be cancelled without refund. Always confirm your exact headcount when booking to avoid disappointment.

Ready to book your Sotogrande yacht charter? Check out our full fleet here and choose the perfect boat for your group size. For any questions, just send us a WhatsApp — we're happy to help.
